# Ahavah

> Ahavah is the matchmaking platform for Messianic, Hebrew Roots, and
> Torah-observant believers seeking a spouse. Verified profiles, courtship
> culture, members across the diaspora in over 100 languages. It is a
> Progressive Web App at https://ahavah.app.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://ahavah.app/): what Ahavah is and how to join.
- [Marriage Checklist](https://ahavah.app/marriage-checklist): a free, guided
  activity for couples and singles. Work through the biblical obligations
  Scripture sets for a husband and a wife (KJV, quoted verbatim), rate what
  matters most, add your own nice-to-haves and challenges, and email a
  personal summary to you and your spouse. Answers are never stored.
- [FAQ](https://ahavah.app/faq): who Ahavah is for, beliefs, verification,
  safety, and cross-border questions.
- [Messianic matchmaking](https://ahavah.app/messianic-matchmaking): for
  Messianic and Hebrew Roots singles seeking marriage.
- [Biblical marriage](https://ahavah.app/biblical-polygyny): the biblical
  plural marriage path Ahavah recognises.
- [Faith marriage abroad](https://ahavah.app/faith-marriage-abroad):
  cross-border, verified matchmaking for the diaspora.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Ahavah is matchmaking for marriage, not casual dating.
- The marriage checklist is free, requires no matchmaking profile, and never
  stores answers; the summary is emailed to the respondent and their spouse.
